---
id: recognize
title: "Recognize a single sentence from the microphone."
description: "Starts a cpal capture -> VAD -> Whisper pipeline, returns the first"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Recognize a single sentence from the microphone."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/stt/recognize"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Starts a cpal capture -&gt; VAD -&gt; Whisper pipeline, returns the first
recognized sentence, then destroys the pipeline. Long-polls until
speech is detected or timeout (60s).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./recognize.RequestSchema.json")}
>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
